title.en: 2-Bedroom | Beachfront | Ibiza – Al Ahyaa District
title.ar: 2-Bedroom | Beachfront | Ibiza – Al Ahyaa District

description.en:
Type: 2-Bedroom
Area: 110 sqm
View: Beach Front
Total Price: EGP 7,062,000

 Location: Ibiza, Al Ahyaa District – next to Casablanca & Fiesta, directly on Mamsha Street. A prime beachfront address in Hurghada’s most vibrant tourism zone.

 Facilities & Amenities:

Direct beach access

5 swimming pools (heated & sky pools)

Cafés & restaurants

Kids area

Green contract

4 elevators & 24/7 security

Water features & waterfalls

Padel court

Housekeeping & rental management services

title.en: One Bedroom 125 SQM - Sea View - Private Beach
title.ar: One Bedroom 125 SQM - Sea View - Private Beach

description.en:
MAJRA 
Project Overview:
Majra… a new landmark of elegance in the heart of El Ahyaa
An integrated development that opens the doors to privacy and comfort with exceptional standards, creating an unprecedented lifestyle. What makes Magra truly unique is being the first project to introduce a dedicated tracking path.
Location:
Magra is located in the heart of El Ahyaa, right on the Tourist Promenade, next to Bellagio Hotel
Spaces:
.The project extends over a total area of 15,000 m², with only 40% built-up and 60% dedicated to greenery.
 .An internal landscape and green areas covering 8,400 m².
.The project includes only 220 residential units, ensuring the highest levels of privacy and comfort.
Project Facilities:
At Magra, every detail of luxury is designed for you and your family
3 swimming pools at different levels, suitable for all ages.
A private sandy beach offering moments of pure relaxation.
A natural lagoon with fun water games for children.
An elegant beachfront restaurant for a unique dining experience with sea views.
A private marina for seaside walks and leisure.
A safe kids’ area where children can play freely with peace of mind.
14 modern elevators serving all buildings, and 6 residential floors with contemporary designs that ensure maximum comfort.
90% of units enjoy breathtaking sea views, with some featuring private garden
Surrounding Services:
Daily shopping made easy with top nearby markets like Carrefour, Khair Zaman, and Best Way.

Comprehensive medical services with more than 11 private hospitals, in addition to Hurghada International Hospital.

High-quality education with prestigious schools such as Leaders, the French School, and the Japanese School.
Exceptional proximity to the new Red Sea University.
Unforgettable sea trips: enjoy diving, snorkeling, yacht rides, or full-day excursions to the enchanting island
Investment Opportunities:
The resort is managed by Prime Hotels Management, ensuring professional hospitality services.
High rental ret

title.en: One Bedroom 622 SQM - Street View - Private Beach
title.ar: One Bedroom 622 SQM - Street View - Private Beach

description.en:
IBIZA BAY
At IBIZA BAY, tranquility meets luxury in a resort designed to offer you a fully integrated seaside lifestyle.

Location:
El Ahyaa District, Hurghada
IBIZA BAY enjoys a strategic location in El Ahyaa with excellent transportation links:
• 20 minutes (24 km) from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna
• 10 minutes from Downtown Hurghada
The resort stretches along an 11 km beachfront, offering both serenity and convenient access to main services, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs.

Project Details:
• Total Land Area: 3,000 sqm
• 60% elegant and modern buildings
• 40% landscaped areas with fountains and waterfalls creating a natural, relaxing atmosphere

Facilities and Amenities:
• Private beach with full privacy
• 3 swimming pools for all ages
• Main café and restaurant with pool views
• Luxurious rooftop with spa, restaurant, and café overlooking the sea
• Fountains and waterfalls adding elegance and calm across the resort

Nearby Landmarks:
Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.
Banks: Egyptian International Bank, Banque Misr, and the Housing & Development Bank.
Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

At IBIZA BAY, you’ll experience comfort, privacy, and a smart investment opportunity in the prime Al ahyaa area — a unique lifestyle directly on the Red Sea.

• 10 minutes from Downtown Hurghada
The resort stretches along an 11 km beachfront, offering both serenity and convenient access to main services, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs.

Project Details:
• Total Land Area: 3,000 sqm
• 60% elegant and modern buildings
• 40% landscaped areas with fountains and waterfalls creating a natural, relaxing atmosphere

Facilities and Amenities:
• Private beach with full privacy
• 3 swimming pools for all ages
• Main café and restaurant with pool views
• Luxurious rooftop with spa, restaurant, and café overlooking the sea
• Fountains and waterfalls adding elegance and calm across the resort

Nearby Landmarks:
Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.
Banks: Egyptian International Bank, Banque Misr, and the Housing & Development Bank.
Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

At IBIZA BAY, you’ll experience comfort, privacy, and a smart investment opportunity in the prime Al ahyaa area — a unique lifestyle directly on the Red Sea.

description.en:
La Gouna Resort 

La Gouna Resort spans 10,000 SQM in the vibrant El Ahyaa district, positioned directly opposite the renowned Sunrise Hotel. The project offers a refined selection of studios and 1–2 bedroom apartments, thoughtfully designed for comfort, functionality, and investment potential.

A one-time 10% maintenance fee applies, with units scheduled for delivery in June 2028.

Facilities & Lifestyle

Expansive central swimming pool plus two panoramic rooftop pools

Stylish rooftop cafés and restaurants overlooking the sea

Dedicated kids’ zone and aqua park

Fully equipped gym, luxurious spa, and relaxing Jacuzzi

Green contract ensuring Eco-conscious development standards

Payment Plans

15% discount for full cash payment

20% down payment with installments over 48 months



With Homes Bay

At Homes Bay, we guide you through every step of your property journey with full transparency, multilingual support, and exclusive developer offers tailored to your investment goals and lifestyle preferences.

title.en: Hayat Beach Resort – Live, Invest, Belong!
title.ar: Hayat Beach Resort – Live, Invest, Belong!

description.en:
On the shores of the Red Sea, between Hurghada and El Gouna, the Hayat Beach Resort offers a unique opportunity for those seeking investment returns or their dream home.  Completion: June 2028

 Why is Hayat Resort a great choice?

Strategic location: Only 5 minutes from El Gouna and 15 minutes from the airport.

High value growth: Property prices in Al Ahyaa are continuously rising thanks to infrastructure development.

Modern design: Inspired by the waves of the sea, combining natural stone and glass surfaces.

Luxury services: 7 swimming pools, aquapark, restaurant, spa, gym, private beach, and marina.

Sustainable lifestyle: 80% green areas, peace, and security.

Offer – Studio apartment with sea view

37 m²

Total price: 2,775,000 EGP (≈49,278 EUR)

Cash price with 20% discount: 2,220,000 EGP (≈39,431 EUR)

Payment plan: 15% down payment, then 39,313 EGP (≈698 EUR) monthly for 60 months

The Hayat Beach Resort is not just a property, but a lifestyle: seaside tranquility, modern comfort, and a secure investment all in one.

description.en:
Chalet for sale in Al-Ahyaa area, Hurghada

Own your unit with a panoramic sea view in the Oro Beach project in Hurghada, located on Al-Ahyaa Road, close to all amenities. The project is directly on the beachfront and features a private beach, swimming pools, parking, and a variety of seaside restaurants and cafes.
Units range from studios to 3 bedrooms, all with either sea or pool views, and boast super-luxurious and smart finishes by Castello Real Estate Development.
Payment plans start with a 10% down payment and installments up to 4 years.

title.en: Seaview 1 Bedroom apartment for sale with discount
title.ar: Seaview 1 Bedroom apartment for sale with discount

description.en:
Ibiza – A New Seaside Landmark in Al Ahyaa

Ibiza is set to become one of Al Ahyaa’s most attractive new developments, offering modern design, direct beach access, and strong investment potential.



Located next to Casablanca and Fiesta, the project sits in a growing, high-demand area ideal for both living and rental returns.



Covering 3,000 , Ibiza features a range of studios and one- and two-bedroom units designed for comfort and long-term value. Residents will enjoy a full resort lifestyle with five pools—including heated and sky pools—cafés, restaurants, a padel court, kids’ facilities, landscaped water features, housekeeping, and 24/7 security.



Professional rental management adds further appeal for investors.


With flexible payment plans of up to 48 months, a 20% cash discount, and delivery scheduled for June 2028, Ibiza offers a rare combination of beachfront living, strong amenities, and accessible pricing. It stands as a standout choice for anyone seeking a quality Red Sea property with excellent future growth.



Prices starting from 35,250 EUR

Areas starting from 52 m²

title.en: Seafront Luxury–Modern Furnished 120 sqm Apartment
title.ar: Seafront Luxury–Modern Furnished 120 sqm Apartment

description.en:
- Own a fully furnished 120 sqm apartment in one of Hurghada’s most desirable seafront compounds – International Beach, located in Al-Ahyaa, directly on the Red Sea.

   - This exceptional unit features two open facades, offering direct sea view from one side and street view from the other, ensuring excellent natural light, ventilation, and long-term value.

* Unit Details:
--------------------
- Total Area: 120 sqm.
- Layout: 2 spacious bedrooms.
- Large living area.
- Large American-style kitchen.
- 1 bathroom.
- Floor: 2nd floor – first balcony level.
- Finishing: Ultra Super Lux.	
- Sold fully furnished with appliances.

* Compound Features:
---------------------------------
- Direct beachfront compound.
- Private sandy beach.
- Secure and well-maintained environment.
- Ideal for residential living and short-term rentals.

* Legal Status:
---------------------
+ Compound registered with Owners Association Contract.
+ Apartment has one clear power of attorney.

This property represents a high-demand beachfront asset in a rapidly developing area.

   - Perfect for short-term holiday rentals, long-term leasing, or capital appreciation, with strong occupancy rates driven by direct beach access and full furnishing.

A turnkey investment offering immediate rental income and long-term value growth in one of Hurghada’s strongest coastal locations.

               - Living the luxury lifestyle you deserve - Where the sea is your daily view and comfort meets sophistication.

                 - Don’t hesitates to own this unique piece of paradise.

title.en: Studio 58 m², fully finished, pool view. Delivery
title.ar: Studio 58 m², fully finished, pool view. Delivery

description.en:
Apartment for Sale in Al Ahyaa Area, Hurghada

(Noor City) – Developed by Al Abtal Company, a developer with previous successful projects in Hurghada and currently working on 7 projects in prime locations.

The project features a strategic location in Al Ahyaa, directly in front of Best Way, close to the tourist promenade, and offers integrated hotel-style services. The project also includes the largest branch of Gomla Market in Hurghada.

Unit Details

Studio – 58 m² with pool view

Studio + kitchen + bathroom

Fully finished (turnkey)

Payment Plan

Cash price only: 1,850,000 EGP

Delivery: 12 / 2026

Project Facilities

Largest Gomla Market branch in Hurghada

3 swimming pools

Gym & Spa

Restaurants and cafés

Kids area

Green spaces

Modern elevators & 24/7 security

Property management & maintenance office

Prime Location

In front of Best Way – Al Ahyaa Area

Steps away from the main tourist promenade

Close to schools and universities

5 minutes from Royal Beach

8 minutes to the university

20 minutes to El Gouna

25 minutes to Hurghada International Airport

title.en: exclusive studio in Hayat Beach Resort
title.ar: exclusive studio in Hayat Beach Resort

description.en:
Discover refined seaside living at Hayat Beach Resort, a premium development located in the fast-growing Al Ahyaa area between El Gouna and Hurghada. The project spans 30,000 m² with only 20% built-up area and 80% lush landscapes, offering a peaceful low-density community surrounded by greenery and open spaces.

Residents enjoy a full resort-style lifestyle with 7 swimming pools, Aqua Park, gym & spa, restaurant & café, underground parking, reception & concierge services, and a 2,000 m² commercial area. The project also features rare private marina access, ideal for boating and water sports enthusiasts.

Units include studios, 1-bedroom, and 2-bedroom apartments with modern designs, spacious balconies, and beautiful sea or pool views.

Prime Location

5 minutes to El Gouna

15 minutes to Hurghada International Airport

 Flexible Payment Plan

15% down payment

Installments up to 5 years

Perfect for holiday homes, rental income, or long-term investment in one of Hurghada’s fastest-growing coastal areas.

description.en:
Luxury Beachfront Hotel Resort
Live the true meaning of coastal life at Ibiza Bay

One of the latest projects by Engineer Shenouda Bishir Real Estate Group

Built on an area of 3,000 sqm with a direct view of the Red Sea

Prime Location:
Hurghada – Al Ahyaa
Extension of Al Waleed Bin Talal Street
Strategic location close to all services

Project Features:
• Direct Beach Access
• 5 Swimming Pools
• 4 Elevators
• Professional Hotel Management for Resale & Rental
• Hotel Reception
• Gym – Restaurants – Cafés
• Kids Area & Padel Court
• CCTV Surveillance + 24/7 Security
• Wi-Fi throughout the resort

Available Unit Sizes:

1 Bedroom + Living Room:
54 sqm – 64 sqm – 65 sqm – 67 sqm – 69 sqm – 70 sqm – 71 sqm

2 Bedrooms + Living Room:
96 sqm – 103 sqm – 104 sqm – 110 sqm – 135 sqm

Exclusive Advantages:
• 80% of units with sea view
• Delivery within 2.5 years
• Fully finished
• Direct from the developer – No commission

Flexible Payment Plans – Launch Phase:
• 15% Down Payment
• Installments up to 4 years with 0% interest
• Special 20% Discount for Cash Payment

title.en: "1-Bedroom Apartment in Ibiza – Down Payment 498 E
title.ar: "1-Bedroom Apartment in Ibiza – Down Payment 498 E

description.en:
Apartment for sale in Al-Ahyaa area, Hurghada

A 70-square-meter apartment in IBIZA BAY, consisting of one bedroom, a spacious living room, a kitchen, and a bathroom. The apartment boasts a super-luxurious finish and a distinctive interior view, ensuring complete privacy and comfort. Residents also enjoy access to all resort amenities, including a private beach, swimming pools, a luxurious rooftop terrace, a restaurant and café, fountains, and lush green spaces.


At IBIZA BAY, tranquility meets luxury in a resort designed to offer a complete beachfront lifestyle.
Location:
Al Ahyaa District, Hurghada.
IBIZA BAY enjoys a strategic location in Al Ahyaa District, with excellent transport links:
• 20 minutes (24 km) from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna
• 10 minutes from Hurghada city center.
This location stretches along a stunning 11-kilometer beachfront, providing peace and quiet with easy access to essential services, educational institutions, and entertainment venues.

Project Details:
• Total Area: 3,000 square meters
• 60% Buildings with elegant and modern architectural design
• 40% Landscaping, fountains, and waterfalls that give the resort a distinctive natural character.
Services and Facilities:

title.en: Golden opportunity in 56 m² prime investment
title.ar: Golden opportunity in 56 m² prime investment

description.en:
Location:
• Located in the heart of Al-Ahyaa, one of Hurghada’s most sought-after residential and investment areas
• Just minutes from the famous Hurghada promenade with restaurants and international cafes
• Only 10 minutes from Hurghada International Airport, offering a strategic location for residents and tourists
• Close to daily amenities such as banks, international schools, and hospitals
Resort Facilities:
• Private sandy beach with full service (chairs, cabanas, water activities)
• 9 swimming pools of different types (heated, infinity, children’s)
• 3 aqua park areas suitable for all ages
• Roof-top health club (spa, jacuzzi, gym, fitness classes)
• 3 supervised children’s play areas
• 3 restaurants + 3 cafes with sea views
• Indoor mall with shops and boutiques
• Sports courts (tennis, basketball, multipurpose halls)
• Private marina for water sports and boat trips
• VIP reception halls and hospitality areas
• Continuous cultural and musical events
• 24/7 security with surveillance cameras and electronic gates
• Hotel services (cleaning, requests, transportation)
Nearby Places:
• 10 minutes from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna – a famous tourist and sports city
• Minutes from the Hurghada promenade (restaurants, cafes, bazaars)
• Close to banks (National Bank of Egypt, Banque Misr, Housing Bank)
• Nearby international schools (El Gouna International, French, German, Japanese, and special needs schools)
• 10 minutes from Hurghada International Hospital and new private hospitals
• Close to major markets (Carrefour, Best Way, Khair Zaman)
• Direct access to famous beaches (Cave Beach, Hawaii, Panorama Bungalows)
• Near Hurghada International Football Club
Investment Opportunities:
• High rental returns
• Growing demand for luxury housing
• Professional project management
• Continuous maintenance and customer support

Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.

Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

title.en: Apartment one bedroom 90 SqM in Oro Beach Resort
title.ar: Apartment one bedroom 90 SqM in Oro Beach Resort

description.en: Oro Beach Resort Prime Address: Located on El Ahyaa Road in Northern Hurghada — one of the most promising coastal districts. Convenient Access: Just minutes from Hurghada International Airport and a short drive to downtown Hurghada Units Studios 1-Bedroom 2-Bedroom 3-Bedroom World-Class Facilities & Amenities Private Beach – Stroll along the pristine shoreline with exclusive access for residents. Swimming Pools – Relax and unwind in beautifully landscaped communal pools. Restaurants – Indulge in a diverse culinary scene with on-site dining options. Spa – Pamper yourself with luxurious spa treatments and wellness therapies. Gym – Maintain a healthy routine with a state-of-the-art fitness center. Cafés – Enjoy leisurely mornings or afternoon breaks with friends. 24/7 Security – Rest assured with comprehensive security and CCTV surveillance. Rental Management – Optimize your investment with professional rental services. Elevators – Swift and convenient access to all floors. Parking – Ample parking spaces for residents and guests. Laundry – On-site laundry facilities are available for added convenience. Housekeeping – Professional cleaning and maintenance services are available. Shopping Center – A variety of retail outlets right at your doorstep. Water Activities – Experience adventure with diving, snorkeling, and water sports. Payment Plans & Delivery 10% down payment, remaining in 24 months 20% down payment, remaining in 36 months 30% down payment, remaining in 48 months Maintenance fee: 10% pay-on-delivery Expected delivery: 2026

title.en: Beachfront 1-Bedroom with Pool and Sea View
title.ar: Beachfront 1-Bedroom with Pool and Sea View

description.en:
1 Bedroom + Living Room | 80 m² | 2nd Floor | Pool & Sea View | ORO Beach Resort

Discover your ideal coastal home at ORO Beach Resort. This spacious 80 m², 1-bedroom apartment on the 2nd floor combines comfort, style, and stunning pool and Red Sea views — perfect for holidays, long-term living, or a high-yield investment.

Apartment Highlights
Bright & Spacious — thoughtfully designed layout maximizes every square meter
Pool & Sea Views — enjoy relaxing scenery from your living space
Investment-Ready — strong rental demand in Hurghada’s growing tourism market

ORO Beach Resort Lifestyle & Amenities
Private beach just steps away
Multiple swimming pools & landscaped gardens
Restaurants, cafés, and vibrant dining options
Spa, wellness, and fully equipped gym
24/7 security and professional rental management
Elevators, parking, laundry, and housekeeping services
Water sports and recreational activities

Prime Location
Along El Ahyaa Road, across from Mubarak 7 Villas
Easy access to Hurghada’s beaches, entertainment, and cultural spots

Price & Payment
Original Price: 5,984,000 EGP
Special Offer: 20% Off → 4,787,200 EGP
Flexible payment plans available

Delivery: 2026

Your perfect 1-bedroom retreat by the Red Sea — live, rent, or invest — the choice is yours at ORO Beach Resort.

description.en:

description.en:
Apartment for sale in Al-Ahyaa area, Hurghada

It's hard to find a beachfront unit at this price in Al-Ahyaa!

A distinctive apartment for sale in Laguna Resort – Al-Ahyaa.


One bedroom + reception.
Area: 65 sq m.
Fourth floor.
Sea view.


Why choose Laguna?

3 swimming pools (2 on the roof + 1 main pool).

Open views and fresh air all year round.

Security and surveillance.

Strategic location in the heart of Al-Ahyaa and close to all services.

Own now with only a 20% down payment
and the rest in installments over 4 years.

This unit is suitable for investment and also for peaceful seaside living… and the number is limited.

Send a message now to learn the installment details and booking steps before you reserve

title.en: Chalet with sea view and Sky Pool – Marvento, Hurg
title.ar: Chalet with sea view and Sky Pool – Marvento, Hurg

description.en:
Apartment for sale in Al-Ahyaa area, Hurghada

Marvento Beach Resort – Hurghada, Egypt.

Marvento Beach Resort is a luxury beachfront residential project located in the rapidly developing Al Haya area of ​​Hurghada on the Red Sea coast. The project combines an upscale beach lifestyle with strong investment potential, offering direct beach access, modern architecture, and comprehensive resort-level amenities. The resort's

prime beachfront location

directly on the Red Sea provides uninterrupted sea views and a private beach. It is approximately 20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport and a short distance from El Gouna Marina, restaurants, and entertainment venues.

Premium Unit – Chalet

Unit Type: Chalet

Area: 41 sq m

Floor: Second Floor

View: Sea and Sky Pool

Payment Plan in Euros:

Installment Price: €52,346

Cash Price with 25% Discount: €47,587

Down Payment 10% over 4 years: €5,234.65

Monthly Installment: €981.50

Delivery Date: Within 3 years

Resort-Level Amenities

Spacious private sandy beach

Raised Sky Pool with panoramic sea views

Multiple swimming pools including a lagoon and infinity

Water parks for adults and children

Gym and fully equipped spa facilities

Restaurants, cafes, and retail spaces

Children's play areas and entertainment areas

Water sports facilities and diving services

24-hour security and property management

Investment Opportunities

Marvento Beach Resort offers strong rental opportunities thanks to its location on the Red Sea, proximity to El Gouna, and the availability of full resort services. Flexible payment plans and professional services make the project attractive to both investors and end-users.

To contact us,
01214982146

title.en: Studio with pool view – Laguna, £1,753,083
title.ar: Studio with pool view – Laguna, £1,753,083

description.en:
Apartment for sale in Al-Ahyaa area, Hurghada

Laguna Resort – Hurghada

is located in the prestigious Al Ahyaa district, directly opposite the Sunrise Hotel. Laguna Resort offers a luxurious residential and tourist lifestyle that combines comfort, elegance, and breathtaking sea views. The project spans 10,000 m² and features a balanced mix of buildings and landscaped green spaces, with units ranging in size from 43 m² to 81 m², allowing for the possibility of combining units to create larger spaces. Available options include views of the sea, pool, and road.

Amenities and services include:

a rooftop pool (Lagoon Pool),

a rooftop restaurant and café,

a children's play area and aqua park,

a gym and spa, and a

jacuzzi.

A green contract guarantees ownership of a share of the land.

Studio apartment for sale in Laguna Resort – Hurghada.

Location: Al Ahyaa Road, Hurghada, Egypt.

Size: 43 m² | Floor: 4th | View: Pool View

Price and Payment Plan (EGP):

Price per sq m: EGP 31,000 – 40,000

Down Payment 20% = EGP 350,617

Installments available up to 4 years = EGP 1,753,083

Delivery Date: December 2028

Why Invest in Laguna Resort?

Prime coastal location with high rental demand

Luxurious facilities and modern design

Flexible payment plans for easy ownership

Why Choose Us?

Personalized and dedicated customer service

Full support from start to finish

Proven track record of successful investments

description.en:
Discover your dream home by the sea with ATA Development, where luxury, comfort, and smart investment come together.

Prime seaside location

2 rooftop pools with panoramic views

title.ar: Ibiza Bay – Hurghada | Al Ahyaa

description.en:
Luxury Beachfront Hotel Resort
Live the true meaning of coastal life at Ibiza Bay

One of the latest projects by Engineer Shenouda Bishir Real Estate Group

Built on an area of 3,000 sqm with a direct view of the Red Sea

Prime Location:
Hurghada – Al Ahyaa
Extension of Al Waleed Bin Talal Street
Strategic location close to all services

Project Features:
• Direct Beach Access
• 5 Swimming Pools
• 4 Elevators
• Professional Hotel Management for Resale & Rental
• Hotel Reception
• Gym – Restaurants – Cafés
• Kids Area & Padel Court
• CCTV Surveillance + 24/7 Security
• Wi-Fi throughout the resort

Available Unit Sizes:

Studios (Hotel Room): 57 sqm

1 Bedroom + Living Room:
54 sqm – 64 sqm – 65 sqm – 67 sqm – 69 sqm – 70 sqm – 71 sqm

2 Bedrooms + Living Room:
96 sqm – 103 sqm – 104 sqm – 110 sqm – 135 sqm

Exclusive Advantages:
• 80% of units with sea view
• Delivery within 2.5 years
• Fully finished
• Direct from the developer – No commission

Flexible Payment Plans – Launch Phase:
• 15% Down Payment
• Installments up to 4 years with 0% interest
• Special 20% Discount for Cash Payment

Al-Abtal Real Estate Development Company

_______________________________________________________________

Unit Details:

**Layout:
  * 3 bedrooms
  * Living room
  * Kitchen
  * Bathroom
  * Terrace

*Finishing: Fully finished
________________________________________________________________
Price:-4,340,000 Egp Or ( 90,416 $ Or 76,814 Euro)
Down Payment:-3,800,000 Egp or (79,166 $ Or 67,256 Euro)

title.en: 1bedroom, street view, Lagouna Resort
title.ar: 1bedroom, street view, Lagouna Resort

description.en:
Lagouna Resort – Hurghada
Located in the prime El Ahyaa area, directly in front of Sunrise Hotel, Lagoona Resort offers luxurious residential and touristic living with comfort, elegance, and stunning sea views. Spread across 10,000 sqm, the resort features a balanced mix of buildings and landscaped green areas, with units ranging from 43 m² to 81 m², including options to combine units for larger spaces. Available views include sea view, pool view, and street view.

Facilities & Amenities:
Rooftop swimming pool (Lagoon Pool)
Rooftop restaurant and café
Kids area and Aqua Park
Gym and Spa
Jacuzzi
Green contract guaranteeing ownership share in the land

One Bed Apartment for Sale at Lagouna Resort, Hurghada 
Location: El Ahyaa Road, Hurghada, Egypt
Size: 65sqm | Floor: 4th| View: street view

Price & Payment Plan: Euro
Price per m²: 31,000 EGP – 40,000 EGP
20% down payment: 9,549
Installments available up to 4 years: 47,748
Delivery date: December 2028

Why Invest in Lagoona Resort:
Prime coastal location with high rental demand
Luxury amenities and modern design
Flexible payment plans for easy ownership

Why Choose Us?
Personalized, client-focused service
Full assistance from A to Z
Proven track record of successful investments

Contact Us Today
Email: marketing@rookestate.net
Phone/WhatsApp: +20 122 904 9361 | +20 150 001 9200

title.en: A Wonderful Family Apartment Al-Ahyaa Al-Jawhara
title.ar: A Wonderful Family Apartment Al-Ahyaa Al-Jawhara

description.en:
- Looking for your dream-home?
It awaits here in Al-Ahyaa area. A stunning apartment of 110 sqm, 3 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, a wide kitchen. This stylish immaculate family apartment is located in Al-Ahyaa Distract containing 2 terrace balcony and a window on a board street.
This leads to a flood of natural light into the whole space of the apartment. The wide family bathroom and bedrooms provides both comfort and sophistication. Not to mention cash purchases remain stronger.

Apartment Specifications:
--------------------------------------
Area: 110 sqm                                                                                                    Red Bricks 
Bedrooms: 3                                                                                                       2 terrace balcony - 1 window
Bathroom: 1                                                                                                       Big kitchen

Al-Ahyaa Area:
----------------------
Al-Ahyaa is an area which provides you with comfort and luxuries living. Since you deserve luxury and relaxation, Al-Ahyaa is a recommended area owing to its ability to combine quietness and rejuvenation. we offer a unique destination for a perfect escape from the everyday noisy life. its tranquil beaches help you unwind and recharge your soul. Unforgettable adventures in the crystal waters connect you with the vibrant marine life to explore colorful coral reefs and witness breathtaking beauty of this underwater paradise. Furthermore, tourist walk is lined with a variety of restaurants and shops, offering delicious cuisine and unique shopping experience. 

         - Here is a stunning apartment not to be missed.

title.en: El Hijaz Hub – الحجاز، الغردقة بمساحه 105 متر
title.ar: El Hijaz Hub – الحجاز، الغردقة بمساحه 105 متر

description.en:
لو بتدور على وحدة سكنية في موقع حيوي وعلى شارع رئيسي…
أو فرصة استثمار بسعر منافس في منطقة الحجاز 
 شارع الحجاز الرئيسي – بجوار بريدج ستون
 مشروع سكني على مساحة 3,800م²
 على 3 شوارع
 بدون وحدات خلفية
 تسليم نصف تشطيب خلال عامين ونصف
 مساحه الواحدة  105 متر
 مساحات متنوعة:
من 34م² حتى 142م² (استوديو – غرفة وصالة – غرفتين – 3 غرف)
 سعر المتر من 20,000 إلى 24,000 جنيه
 مقدم يبدأ من 170,000 جنيه
 أنظمة سداد: 25% حتى 3 سنوات
أو 40% حتى 4 سنوات

description.en:
Exclusive Studio Apartment with Private Beach – Oro Beach, Hurghada

High-End Finished Studio with Flexible Payment Plans

Size: 55 m²
Type: Studio
Bathrooms: 1
View: SIide sea View
Location: Oro Beach, Hurghada

Property Features
• Spacious open-plan layout combining living and dining area
• Modern kitchen with granite countertops and premium wooden cabinetry
• Private terrace with elegant glass railings, ideal for morning coffee or evening sunsets
• Luxury finishes including:
– High-quality marble flooring
– Suspended ceilings with integrated LED lighting
– Premium branded fixtures  

Flexible Payment Plans
• 10% down payment – installments up to 2 years
• 20% down payment – installments up to 3 years
• 30% down payment – installments up to 4 years
• 20% discount for cash buyers
Resort Amenities
• Private beach access
• 24/7 security
• Shopping boutiques with international brands
• Professional housekeeping service
• Fitness center and spa
• Fine dining restaurants
• Swimming pool

Perfectly positioned on the third floor of a modern 5-level building, this 81 m² home features one spacious bedroom, a bathroom, and a bright living space that opens to a private balcony with Promenade view.

The apartment offers an excellent layout for comfort and functionality, making it a strong investment opportunity and a desirable residence. As part of an exclusive community in Al Ahyaa, residents enjoy direct access to a private beach and pool, creating the perfect blend of seaside relaxation and convenience.

Located just minutes from central Hurghada and the popular area, the property benefits from a strategic location with easy access to restaurants, shopping, and all services, while still offering the peaceful charm of the Red Sea coast.

With a competitive price of 2,850,000 EGP, this apartment is a valuable opportunity for those looking to invest in Red Sea properties or own a coastal retreat in Al Ahyaa Hurghada.

title.en: Studio, Lagouna Resort, Street view
title.ar: Studio, Lagouna Resort, Street view

description.en:
Lagona Resort – Hurghada
Located in the prime El Ahyaa area, directly in front of Sunrise Hotel, Lagona Resort offers luxurious residential and touristic living with comfort, elegance, and stunning sea views. Spread across 10,000 sqm, the resort features a balanced mix of buildings and landscaped green areas, with units ranging from 43 m² to 81 m², including options to combine units for larger spaces. Available views include sea view, pool view, and street view.

Facilities & Amenities:
Rooftop swimming pool (Lagon Pool)
Rooftop restaurant and café
Kids area and Aqua Park
Gym and Spa
Jacuzzi
Green contract guaranteeing ownership share in the land

title.en: Secure 71 m² with full daily entertainment
title.ar: Secure 71 m² with full daily entertainment

description.en:
Location:
• Located in the heart of Al-Ahyaa, one of Hurghada’s most sought-after residential and investment areas
• Just minutes from the famous Hurghada promenade with restaurants and international cafes
• Only 10 minutes from Hurghada International Airport, offering a strategic location for residents and tourists
• Close to daily amenities such as banks, international schools, and hospitals
Resort Facilities:
• Private sandy beach with full service (chairs, cabanas, water activities)
• 9 swimming pools of different types (heated, infinity, children’s)
• 3 aqua park areas suitable for all ages
• Roof-top health club (spa, jacuzzi, gym, fitness classes)
• 3 supervised children’s play areas
• 3 restaurants + 3 cafes with sea views
• Indoor mall with shops and boutiques
• Sports courts (tennis, basketball, multipurpose halls)
• Private marina for water sports and boat trips
• VIP reception halls and hospitality areas
• Continuous cultural and musical events
• 24/7 security with surveillance cameras and electronic gates
• Hotel services (cleaning, requests, transportation)
Nearby Places:
• 10 minutes from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna – a famous tourist and sports city
• Minutes from the Hurghada promenade (restaurants, cafes, bazaars)
• Close to banks (National Bank of Egypt, Banque Misr, Housing Bank)
• Nearby international schools (El Gouna International, French, German, Japanese, and special needs schools)
• 10 minutes from Hurghada International Hospital and new private hospitals
• Close to major markets (Carrefour, Best Way, Khair Zaman)
• Direct access to famous beaches (Cave Beach, Hawaii, Panorama Bungalows)
• Near Hurghada International Football Club

title.en: 70 m² with 3 swimming pools
title.ar: 70 m² with 3 swimming pools

description.en:
Location:
El Ahyaa District, Hurghada
IBIZA BAY enjoys a strategic location in El Ahyaa with excellent transportation links:
• 20 minutes (24 km) from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna
• 10 minutes from Downtown Hurghada
The resort stretches along an 11 km beachfront, offering both serenity and convenient access to main services, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs.

Project Details:
• Total Land Area: 3,000 sqm
• 60% elegant and modern buildings
• 40% landscaped areas with fountains and waterfalls creating a natural, relaxing atmosphere

Facilities and Amenities:
• Private beach with full privacy
• 3 swimming pools for all ages
• Main café and restaurant with pool views
• Luxurious rooftop with spa, restaurant, and café overlooking the sea
• Fountains and waterfalls adding elegance and calm across the resort

Nearby Landmarks:
Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.
Banks: Egyptian International Bank, Banque Misr, and the Housing & Development Bank.
Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

title.en: Furnished Apartment with Side Sea View in Al Ahyaa
title.ar: Furnished Apartment with Side Sea View in Al Ahyaa

description.en:
Enjoy peaceful seaside living in this elegant apartment located in Turtle Beach – Al Ahyaa District, one of Hurghada’s charming beachfront communities. This property combines a great location with an attractive price, making it an ideal choice for living or investment.

With a built-up area of 65 sqm, the apartment features one comfortable bedroom, a modern bathroom with stylish finishes, and an open-plan living area that creates a warm and welcoming atmosphere. The side sea view adds a daily touch of Red Sea beauty and refreshing coastal breeze.

The apartment is fully furnished and ready for immediate move-in, saving you time and additional costs. Residents also benefit from access to a shared swimming pool and well-maintained facilities, all within a calm and private beachfront setting.

Located in Al Ahyaa, the property offers a quiet residential environment while remaining easily accessible to the city center and essential amenities — perfect as a holiday home, permanent residence, or a rental investment with solid potential.

Price: 65,000 EUR

Own your furnished sea-view apartment today and embrace relaxed coastal living by the Red Sea

title.en: Studio 20% Down, 4-Year Installments, Prime Resort
title.ar: Studio 20% Down, 4-Year Installments, Prime Resort

description.en:
Studio 47 m² | La Gouna Resort – Hurghada

Own a modern 47 m² studio at La Gouna Resort – Al Ahyaa, Hurghada, in a quiet mountainous location that ensures privacy and tranquility, just 20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport and 20 minutes from El Gouna. The location perfectly combines peaceful surroundings with proximity to key tourist areas, making it an excellent choice for personal use or as a holiday investment.

The unit is located on the first floor with a practical layout that provides comfortable space distribution, offering ideal comfort for personal living or short- and long-term rentals.

Unit Details:
• Area: 47 m²
• Type: Studio (Living area – Kitchen – Bathroom)
• Floor: First
• View: Peaceful mountain view

Resort Facilities & Services:
• 4 swimming pools, including 2 rooftop pools
• Fully equipped gym
• Children’s play area
• On-site café and restaurant
• Integrated commercial area
• Reception lobby & 24/7 concierge service
• 6 modern elevators
• Full security system with surveillance cameras

Payment Plans:
• Total Price: EGP 1,657,220
• 20% Down Payment with installments up to 48 months, interest-free
• Cash payment discount available

Expected Delivery: June 2028

Why this studio is a great opportunity:
It combines a practical design, comfortable space, and a peaceful mountain view with close access to key tourist areas, making it a strong option for holiday investment with high rental potential and expected future value growth.

title.en: Sea View 3BR Apartment | Fanadir Bay Hurghada
title.ar: Sea View 3BR Apartment | Fanadir Bay Hurghada

description.en:
A spacious and beautifully furnished apartment is now available for sale in Fanadir Bay, located in the Al Ahyaa district of Hurghada. This property offers a comfortable lifestyle with a stunning sea view and access to a shared swimming pool, making it perfect for both residential living and holiday use.

Situated on the 5th floor, the apartment enjoys elevated views and a bright atmosphere throughout the living spaces. With 145 sqm of living area, the unit offers a practical layout featuring three bedrooms and three bathrooms, ideal for families or buyers seeking a larger holiday property near the Red Sea.

The apartment is fully furnished and ready to move, allowing the new owner to start enjoying the property immediately or use it as a rental investment in one of Hurghada’s growing coastal areas.

Property Details

3 Bedrooms

3 Bathrooms

BUA: 145 sqm

Floor: 5th Floor

View: Sea View

Facilities: Shared Swimming Pool

Condition: Furnished

Status: Ready to Move
Price: 7,000,000 EGP

description.en:
Oro Beach Resort is a contemporary residential and investment development located in the Al Ahyaa area of Hurghada, directly on the Red Sea. Spanning a total area of 8,200 square meters, the project offers a prime opportunity for those seeking a beachfront home, a holiday property, or a high-return real estate investment.

Project Overview

The resort is designed to provide a modern, integrated lifestyle with direct beach access and a range of premium facilities. Oro Beach Resort offers a selection of residential units that suit different needs and budgets, making it an attractive option for both end-users and investors.

Available Units

The project features a variety of unit types, including:

Studios

One-bedroom apartments

Two-bedroom apartments

All units are designed with functional layouts and modern finishing to ensure comfort, privacy, and long-term value.

Facilities and Amenities

Oro Beach Resort delivers a fully serviced living environment with a comprehensive list of amenities, including:

Private beach

A swimming pool extending across the project

On-site cafés and restaurants

Fully equipped gym and spa

Commercial mall

Rental services

Elevators for easy access to all floors

Water activities

Housekeeping services

24/7 security and surveillance

These facilities ensure a high-quality residential experience and a strong appeal for short-term and long-term rental demand.

Payment Plans

Oro Beach Resort provides flexible payment options suitable for different financial preferences:

10% down payment with installments over 2 years

20% down payment with installments over 3 years

30% down payment with installments over 4 years

Buyers can also benefit from a 20% discount on full cash payments, making the project an excellent investment opportunity.

description.en:
Studio with Pool & Garden View | Marvento Beach Resort – Hurghada

Own now a stylish 48 m² studio at Marvento Beach Resort in the Al Ahyaa area – Hurghada, featuring a beautiful view of the pool and garden. This unit is part of one of the latest premium coastal projects on the Red Sea. It’s perfect for living or as a tourism investment, especially with a private sandy beach and full resort services, offering a comfortable lifestyle and a strong rental income potential.

Unit Details:

Type: Studio

Area: 48 m²

View: Pool & Garden

Finish: Ultra Super-Lux

Total Price: EGP 3,200,259

Payment Plan:
20% down payment + 5-year equal installments

Project Features:

Private sandy beach

Egypt’s first sky pool

Multiple swimming pools & aqua park

24/7 security

Commercial area with cafes & restaurants

Gym, spa, and clubhouse

Rental management & property services

Diving center & kite surfing academy

Prime Location:

In the heart of Al Ahyaa

Close to key services and amenities

Just minutes from Hurghada city center and the tourist promenade

Why this studio is a great opportunity:
Combining a larger area with a stunning pool and garden view, flexible 5-year installment plan, and full resort amenities, this studio is an excellent choice for residential use or tourism investment, offering strong year-round rental returns.

description.en:
La Gouna Resort is a contemporary residential project located in Al Ahyaa, Hurghada – Red Sea, one of the city’s well-established and growing areas. The project combines a strategic location, practical design, and integrated services, making it an excellent option for both comfortable living and real estate investment.

Project Area and Planning
The project is developed on a total land area of 10,000 square meters and is thoughtfully planned to balance residential buildings with landscaped areas and services. The layout ensures easy movement, privacy, and a comfortable living environment for residents.

Available Unit Types
La Gouna Resort offers a variety of units to suit different needs and budgets, including:

Studio apartments

One-bedroom apartments

Two-bedroom apartments

All units are designed with efficient layouts that maximize space, making them ideal for permanent residence, holiday use, or rental investment.

Facilities and Amenities
The project provides a full range of on-site services designed to support a modern lifestyle:

3 swimming pools within the project

2 rooftop swimming pools with panoramic sea views

Cafés and restaurants

Landscaped green areas

Integrated commercial area

24/7 security and CCTV surveillance

These facilities enhance daily comfort and significantly increase the investment value of the project.

Payment Plan
La Gouna Resort offers flexible payment options to meet different buyer needs:

20% down payment with installments over 4 years

15% discount for full cash payment

Conclusion
La Gouna Resort represents a strong opportunity to own a property in a prime area of Hurghada, offering integrated services, practical unit designs, and attractive payment plans, making it suitable for both end users and long-term investors.

title.en: 65 sqm Ground Floor 1BR at IBIZA BAY  Private Live
title.ar: 65 sqm Ground Floor 1BR at IBIZA BAY  Private Live

description.en:
At IBIZA BAY, tranquility meets luxury in a resort designed to offer you a fully integrated seaside lifestyle.

Location:
El Ahyaa District, Hurghada
IBIZA BAY enjoys a strategic location in El Ahyaa with excellent transportation links:
• 20 minutes (24 km) from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna
• 10 minutes from Downtown Hurghada
The resort stretches along an 11 km beachfront, offering both serenity and convenient access to main services, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs.

Project Details:
• Total Land Area: 3,000 sqm
• 60% elegant and modern buildings
• 40% landscaped areas with fountains and waterfalls creating a natural, relaxing atmosphere

Facilities and Amenities:
• Private beach with full privacy
• 3 swimming pools for all ages
• Main café and restaurant with pool views
• Luxurious rooftop with spa, restaurant, and café overlooking the sea
• Fountains and waterfalls adding elegance and calm across the resort

Nearby Landmarks:
Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.
Banks: Egyptian International Bank, Banque Misr, and the Housing & Development Bank.
Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

At IBIZA BAY, you’ll experience comfort, privacy, and a smart investment opportunity in the prime ahyaa area — a unique lifestyle directly on the Red Sea.

title.en: Your 41  sqm on 10,000 sqm private beach
title.ar: Your 41  sqm on 10,000 sqm private beach

description.en:
Location
•	Al Ahyaa, Hurghada
• 5 minutes from Al Ahyaa Promenade
• 8 minutes from El Gouna
• 20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport
•	
Project Description
•	The project spans a total area of 30,000 sqm, with 80% allocated to green landscapes and swimming pools, and only 20% dedicated to buildings, offering a serene environment that blends privacy, comfort, and open nature. The smart master plan ensures maximum relaxation and enjoyment.
•	
Available Views
•	• Pool view
• Garden or street view
• Partial sea view
•	
Features, Facilities & Services
•	• 6 swimming pools with various designs suitable for all ages
• 2 Aqua Parks for more fun and entertainment
• 3 dedicated Kids Areas
• Sky Pool with stunning panoramic views
• Luxury spa and fully equipped gym
• Clubhouse for social activities
• 100-meter-long strip mall with shops, restaurants, cafés, and various services
• Cafés and restaurants with distinctive views
• 2 Pool Bars
• Panoramic elevators
• Electric vehicle charging stations
• Full hotel services (housekeeping & laundry)
• Underground parking
• 24/7 security and surveillance
• Various water sports
• Diving center & kitesurfing academy
• Beach activities such as volleyball
• 2 panoramic restaurants
• Private beach covering 10,000 sqm
•	
Unique Design Features
•	• The first Sky Pool experience in Egypt
• Smart design ensuring extended sea views
• Stunning sandy beach vibes
• Two parks dedicated to adults and children
•

title.en: 99 SQM apartment with 2 bedrooms-pool view
title.ar: 99 SQM apartment with 2 bedrooms-pool view

description.en:
Aqua Infinity
Aqua Infinity… Your Ideal Destination for an Elegant Lifestyle that Blends Natural Tranquility with Full Urban Services
Located in the heart of the peaceful “Wozara” (Ministers’) district, Aqua Infinity offers a perfect blend of comfort and luxury at every corner. Its modern design and diverse facilities make you feel like you're in a private resort—with everything you need just steps away. Whether you’re looking for a place to relax or a unique investment opportunity, Aqua Infinity is the destination that meets all your aspirations.
Location
Aqua Infinity Resort is located in the quiet Wozara area, just before El Gouna, in the El Ahyaa district of Hurghada. It's only 20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport, offering convenient access to central Hurghada, El Gouna, international schools, private hospitals, the touristic promenade, and natural beaches.
Project Highlights:
•	Prime location in the Wozara district, just before El Gouna — offering a perfect balance between calm and city life
•	Total area: 6,000 sqm, featuring two swimming pools and a mini aqua park for a fun water experience
•	Rooftop terrace with a jacuzzi and sun loungers for resort-style relaxation
•	Access to the facilities of the neighboring resort, including a supermarket, spa, beauty salon, and gym
•	24/7 security services with surveillance cameras for resident safety
•	Integrated hotel-style property management for unit rentals and resale services
•	Units delivered with premium finishes (Super Lux) and high rental potential through a specialized company
Nearby Amenities:
•	Schools:
The area is home to a variety of schools, including Leaders Language School, and several international schools (French, German, Japanese), as well as a special needs school—making it a perfect option for families seeking quality education.
•	Shopping & Commercial Services:
Just steps from the new 11 km touristic promenade, which features a wide selection of cafés, restaurants, and shops. Residents

title.en: 57 sqm Studio at IBIZA BAY – Smart Design & Cozy
title.ar: 57 sqm Studio at IBIZA BAY – Smart Design & Cozy

description.en:
At IBIZA BAY, tranquility meets luxury in a resort designed to offer you a fully integrated seaside lifestyle.

Location:
El Ahyaa District, Hurghada
IBIZA BAY enjoys a strategic location in El Ahyaa with excellent transportation links:
• 20 minutes (24 km) from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna
• 10 minutes from Downtown Hurghada
The resort stretches along an 11 km beachfront, offering both serenity and convenient access to main services, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs.

Project Details:
• Total Land Area: 3,000 sqm
• 60% elegant and modern buildings
• 40% landscaped areas with fountains and waterfalls creating a natural, relaxing atmosphere

Facilities and Amenities:
• Private beach with full privacy
• 3 swimming pools for all ages
• Main café and restaurant with pool views
• Luxurious rooftop with spa, restaurant, and café overlooking the sea
• Fountains and waterfalls adding elegance and calm across the resort

Nearby Landmarks:
Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.
Banks: Egyptian International Bank, Banque Misr, and the Housing & Development Bank.
Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

At IBIZA BAY, you’ll experience comfort, privacy, and a smart investment opportunity in the prime ahyaa area — a unique lifestyle directly on the Red Sea.

title.en: Sea Side Studio in Beachfront Compound
title.ar: Sea Side Studio in Beachfront Compound

description.en:
Studio Apartment | 55 m² | 4th Floor | Side Sea View | ORO Beach Resort

Step into your modern seaside escape at ORO Beach Resort. This spacious 4th-floor studio offers side views of the Red Sea, bright interiors, and a smart, functional layout — perfect for holidays, permanent living, or high-yield rental investment.

Apartment Highlights
Spacious & Light-Filled — designed to maximize every square meter
Side Sea View — enjoy glimpses of the Red Sea from your home
Investment-Ready — strong rental potential in Hurghada’s growing tourist market

ORO Beach Resort Lifestyle & Amenities
Private beach just steps away
Swimming pools & landscaped gardens
Restaurants, cafés, and vibrant culinary options
Spa, wellness, and state-of-the-art gym
24/7 security and professional rental management
Elevators, parking, laundry, and housekeeping services
Water sports and recreational activities

Prime Location
Along El Ahyaa Road, across from Mubarak 7 Villas
Quick access to Hurghada’s beaches, entertainment, and cultural attractions

Pricing & Payment Options
Full Price: 3,696,000 EGP
Cash Offer: 20% OFF → 2,956,800 EGP
Flexible payment plans available

Delivery: 2026

Your ideal Red Sea studio — live, rent, or invest. ORO Beach Resort offers the perfect balance of comfort, lifestyle, and value.

Studio Apartment | 55 m² | 4th Floor | Side Sea View | ORO Beach Resort

Step into your modern seaside escape at ORO Beach Resort. This spacious 4th-floor studio offers side views of the Red Sea, bright interiors, and a smart, functional layout — perfect for holidays, permanent living, or high-yield rental investment.

Apartment Highlights
Spacious & Light-Filled — designed to maximize every square meter
Side Sea View — enjoy glimpses of the Red Sea from your home
Investment-Ready — strong rental potential in Hurghada’s growing tourist market

ORO Beach Resort Lifestyle & Amenities
Private beach just steps away
Swimming pools & landscaped gardens
Restaurants, cafés, and vibrant culinary options
Spa, wellness, and state-of-the-art gym
24/7 security and professional rental management
Elevators, parking, laundry, and housekeeping services
Water sports and recreational activities

Prime Location
Along El Ahyaa Road, across from Mubarak 7 Villas
Quick access to Hurghada’s beaches, entertainment, and cultural attractions

Pricing & Payment Options
Full Price: 3,696,000 EGP
Cash Offer: 20% OFF → 2,956,800 EGP
Flexible payment plans available

Delivery: 2026

Your ideal Red Sea studio — live, rent, or invest. ORO Beach Resort offers the perfect balance of comfort, lifestyle, and value.

title.en: Studio apartment for sale at La Gouna Resort
title.ar: Studio apartment for sale at La Gouna Resort

description.en:
La Gouna Resort is a modern residential and holiday development located in the Al-Ahyaa district of Hurghada, one of the city’s fast-growing coastal areas. The project is built on approximately 10,000 m² and designed as a fully serviced gated community offering a comfortable resort-style lifestyle near the Red Sea. Its strategic location provides quick access to El Gouna, Hurghada International Airport, beaches, and major tourist attractions, making it ideal for both living and investment.

The project offers a range of studios, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom apartments with modern architecture and relaxing views of pools, lagoons, or landscaped areas. With around 40% of the project dedicated to green spaces and leisure areas, residents can enjoy a peaceful environment combined with hotel-style services and facilities.

Facilities & Amenities

La Gouna Resort provides a wide range of facilities designed for comfort, leisure, and entertainment, including:

Large swimming pools and rooftop infinity pools

Private lagoon pool and water features

Kids’ area and aqua park

Gym, spa, and jacuzzi wellness facilities

Restaurants and cafés

Commercial area with shops

Rooftop cafés and relaxation areas

Landscaped gardens and green areas

24/7 security and CCTV system

Reception lobby and concierge services

Modern elevators

Parking spaces

High-speed Wi-Fi and satellite system

Gated community with hotel-style management

La Gouna Resort is located in Al Ahyaa district in Hurghada, one of the fastest-growing residential areas on the Red Sea coast. The project offers a well-planned residential environment suitable for both living and investment purposes.

The development spans a total land area of 10,000 sqm, designed to maximize space efficiency while ensuring privacy, accessibility, and organized internal layout.

Available Unit Types

La Gouna Resort offers a range of residential units to meet different needs:

Studios

One-bedroom apartments

Two-bedroom apartments

All units are designed with practical layouts and efficient space distribution, with various internal views within the project.

Facilities & Services

The project provides a comprehensive range of amenities, including:

3 swimming pools

2 rooftop swimming pools with panoramic sea view

Commercial area

Cafés and restaurants

24/7 reception

Security system and surveillance cameras

These services ensure a comfortable and secure residential environment for both residents and investors.

Payment Plan

Flexible payment options are available:

20% down payment with installments up to 4 years, interest-free

15% discount for cash payment

La Gouna Resort represents a solid opportunity in Al Ahyaa, Hurghada, particularly with the increasing demand for compact and mid-sized residential units in this expanding area of the Red Sea.

title.en: 1 Bedroom Sea View | Oro
title.ar: 1 Bedroom Sea View | Oro

description.en:
1 Bedroom Beachfront Apartment for Sale – Sea & Pool View | Oro Beach Resort, Hurghada

Modern 1-bedroom apartment for sale in Oro Beach Resort, a beachfront development on El Ahyaa Road in North Hurghada, directly opposite Mubarak 7 Villas. The project offers direct access to the Red Sea and a relaxed coastal lifestyle, making it ideal for both holiday homes and property investment.

This unit 530 is located on the 5th floor and offers a total area of 90 sqm with both sea and pool views. The apartment features a spacious layout including a comfortable bedroom, living and dining area, kitchen space, and a balcony where residents can enjoy views of the Red Sea and the resort pool. The combination of sea and pool views adds strong lifestyle and rental appeal.

Oro Beach Resort is designed as a modern beachfront community offering a mix of residential comfort and resort-style amenities. The development includes a variety of apartment types and is planned to support both short stays and long-term living.

Property Details
Unit: 530
Type: 1 Bedroom Apartment
Floor: 5th Floor
Size: 90 sqm
View: Sea and Pool View

Community Features
• Direct private beach access
• Swimming pools with relaxation areas
• Kids swimming pool
• Restaurants, cafés, and bars
• Sea view terraces and leisure spaces
• Gated community with security
• Satellite TV and building services

Location Advantages
Located on El Ahyaa Road (Al Ahyaa) in North Hurghada
Directly opposite Mubarak 7 Villas
Easy access to downtown Hurghada and the marina
Convenient drive to Hurghada International Airport

Payment Plan
Flexible payment options available:
• 10% down payment with installments up to 24 months
• 20% down payment with installments up to 36 months
• 30% down payment with installments up to 48 months

Maintenance fee: 10% upon delivery

Delivery
Expected delivery: 2026

Contact us today to receive the latest price list, floor plans, and availability at Oro Beach Resort Hurghada.

Modern 1-bedroom apartment for sale in Oro Beach Resort, a beachfront residential development located on El Ahyaa Road in North Hurghada, directly opposite Mubarak 7 Villas. The project offers a peaceful coastal setting with direct access to the Red Sea, making it ideal for holiday living, full-time residence, or investment.

This unit 431 is located on the 4th floor and offers a total area of 91 sqm with both sea and pool views. The apartment features a comfortable layout including a bedroom, living and dining area, kitchen space, and a balcony overlooking the pool and the Red Sea. The combination of sea and pool views adds strong lifestyle value and rental appeal.

Oro Beach Resort is designed as a modern beachfront community with resort-style amenities and services to support both residents and guests. The project offers a relaxed atmosphere while still providing convenient access to the main areas of Hurghada.

Property Details
Unit: 431
Type: 1 Bedroom Apartment
Floor: 4th Floor
Size: 91 sqm
View: Sea and Pool View

Community Features
• Direct private beach access
• Swimming pools with relaxation areas
• Kids swimming pool
• Restaurants, cafés, and bars
• Sea view leisure areas
• Gated community with security
• Satellite TV and building services

Location Advantages
Located on El Ahyaa Road (Al Ahyaa) in North Hurghada
Directly opposite Mubarak 7 Villas
Easy access to downtown Hurghada and the marina
Convenient drive to Hurghada International Airport

Payment Plan
Flexible payment options available:
• 10% down payment with installments up to 24 months
• 20% down payment with installments up to 36 months
• 30% down payment with installments up to 48 months

Maintenance fee: 10% upon delivery

Delivery
Expected delivery: 2026

Contact us today to receive the latest price list, floor plans, and availability at Oro Beach Resort Hurghada.

description.en:
1 Bedroom Apartment for Sale – Sea & Pool View | Marvento Beach Resort, Hurghada

Modern 1-bedroom apartment in Marvento Beach Resort, a new beachfront development by Emperor Developments located in the growing Al Ahyaa area of Hurghada. The project offers a resort-style lifestyle with direct access to the Red Sea and a wide range of facilities designed for both comfortable living and holiday stays.

This unit F657 is located on level 7 and has a total area of 72 sqm with pool and sea views. The apartment offers a practical layout with a bedroom, living and dining area, kitchen space, and a balcony where residents can enjoy open views of the Red Sea and the resort pools. The elevated floor provides more privacy and better views, making it attractive for both personal use and rental potential.

Marvento Beach Resort is designed as a modern beachfront community with high-end amenities and services. All units are delivered fully finished with ultra super lux specifications, allowing owners to move in or prepare the property for rental with minimal setup.

Property Details
Unit: F657
Type: 1 Bedroom Apartment
Floor: Level 7
Size: 72 sqm
View: Pool and Sea View
Finishing: Fully Finished – Ultra Super Lux

Community Features
Private sandy beach
Sky pool concept
Multiple swimming pools
Aqua park for adults and kids
Diving center and kiting academy
Clubhouse
Gym and spa
Kids area
Pool bar, cafés, and restaurants
Commercial area and supermarket
Housekeeping and laundry services
Property management
Panoramic elevators
Parking and electric car station
24/7 security and surveillance

Payment Plan
10% down payment with installments up to 4 years
15% down payment with installments up to 5 years
20% down payment with installments up to 5 years

Maintenance fee: 10% upon delivery
Delivery: expected within 3 years.

Apartment Details

3 Bedrooms + Reception + Kitchen + Bathroom

Terrace overlooking the swimming pools

Super Lux finishing

3 Swimming Pools

Modern elevators

Children’s play area

title.en: Studio apartment for sale at La Gouna Resort
title.ar: Studio apartment for sale at La Gouna Resort

description.en:
La Gouna Resort Hurghada is a modern residential resort located in the Al Ahyaa area of Hurghada, between the city center and El Gouna. The project offers stylish studios and one- and two-bedroom apartments designed with contemporary architecture and beautiful views of the Red Sea, pools, and landscaped gardens.

The resort provides a variety of facilities including swimming pools, rooftop pools, lagoon areas, restaurants and cafés, gym, spa, kids’ aqua park, commercial areas, and 24/7 security. Its prime location close to beaches, entertainment areas, and Hurghada International Airport makes it an excellent choice for both holiday homes and real estate investment.
0% interest with cash discount
La Gouna Resort offers a clear payment structure. So, buyers can spread the cost over time.

Down payment: 20%
Installments: up to 48 months
Interest: 0%
Cash discount: 15% on full payment
Maintenance fee: 10% one-time payment at delivery

title.en: 65m² Apartment in La Gouna Hurghada | 4Y Plan
title.ar: 65m² Apartment in La Gouna Hurghada | 4Y Plan

description.en:
65 m² Apartment | La Gouna Resort – Hurghada

Own a modern 65 m² apartment in La Gouna Resort – Al Ahyaa, Hurghada, in a prime strategic location in front of SUNRISE Alora Aqua Park Resort, just 20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport and 20 minutes from El Gouna. The location combines tranquility with proximity to key tourist areas, making it an excellent choice for living or for tourism investment.

The apartment is on the second floor and features a practical layout that maximizes space while providing comfort and privacy, making it suitable for personal residence or short- and long-term rentals.

Unit Details:

Area: 65 m²

Type: One-bedroom apartment (bedroom + living area + kitchen + bathroom)

Floor: Second

Project Facilities and Services:

4 swimming pools, including 2 on the rooftop

Fully equipped gym

Children’s play area

Café and restaurant within the resort

Integrated commercial area

Lobby with 24/7 concierge service

6 modern elevators

Complete security system with surveillance cameras

Payment Plans:

Down payment 20%: EGP 439,725

Installments up to 48 months interest-free

Discount for full cash payment

Cash Price After Discount:
EGP 2,198,625

Expected Delivery Date: June 2028

Why This Apartment Is a Great Opportunity:
It combines a comfortable living space and a strategic location near El Gouna and major resorts, making it a strong investment opportunity with high rental yield potential and expected future value appreciation.

title.ar: Studio apartment for sale at Oro Beach Resort

description.en:
Oro Beach Resort Hurghada is a modern beachfront residential project located in the Al Ahyaa area of Hurghada. The resort offers stylish studios and one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments with beautiful views of the Red Sea, pools, and landscaped gardens. Designed for comfortable seaside living, the project combines contemporary architecture with a relaxing resort atmosphere.

Residents can enjoy a range of facilities including swimming pools, private beach access, restaurants and cafés, gym, spa, children’s areas, and 24/7 security. Its location just 15–20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport and the city center makes it an attractive option for both holiday homes and investment opportunities.
Payment Plan Options:

10% down payment with installments up to 2 years

20% down payment with installments up to 3 years

30% down payment with installments up to 4 years

title.ar: studio apartment 40sqm pool view

description.en:
La Gouna Resort is located in Al Ahyaa district in Hurghada, one of the fastest-growing residential areas on the Red Sea coast. The project offers a well-planned residential environment suitable for both living and investment purposes.

The development spans a total land area of 10,000 sqm, designed to maximize space efficiency while ensuring privacy, accessibility, and organized internal layout.

Available Unit Types

La Gouna Resort offers a range of residential units to meet different needs:

Studios

One-bedroom apartments

Two-bedroom apartments

All units are designed with practical layouts and efficient space distribution, with various internal views within the project.

Facilities & Services

The project provides a comprehensive range of amenities, including:

3 swimming pools

2 rooftop swimming pools with panoramic sea view

Commercial area

Cafés and restaurants

24/7 reception

Security system and surveillance cameras

These services ensure a comfortable and secure residential environment for both residents and investors.

Payment Plan

Flexible payment options are available:

20% down payment with installments up to 4 years, interest-free

15% discount for cash payment

La Gouna Resort represents a solid opportunity in Al Ahyaa, Hurghada, particularly with the increasing demand for compact and mid-sized residential units in this expanding area of the Red Sea.

description.en:
Modern one‑bedroom apartment (63 sqm) with sea & pool view, offering cozy living in the heart of Marvento Resort, Al Ahyaa District. Ideal for couples, holiday seekers, or investors looking for a smart entry into beachfront living.

 Unit Details:  
• Unit Number: 1F‑628
• Size: 63 sqm
• View: Sea & Pool (Sam)
• Total Price: 4,567,500 EGP  
• Down Payment (Cash): 3,425,625 EGP (≈ 58,062 €)

• Direct beach access

• 5 swimming pools (heated & infinity)

• Water features & waterfalls
• Padel court
• Housekeeping & rental management services

title.en: 1bedroom apartment  90sqm pool &sea view
title.ar: 1bedroom apartment  90sqm pool &sea view

description.en:
If you are looking for a residential experience that combines tranquility, luxury, and full services, Oro Beach Resort offers an exceptional opportunity for living or investment in the heart of Hurghada.

Location
The project is located in El Ahyaa, Hurghada, directly on the Red Sea, offering stunning sea views, privacy, and comfort, with easy access to all essential services and amenities.

Project Area & Units
Spanning a total area of 8,200 sqm, Oro Beach Resort offers a variety of thoughtfully designed residential units to meet different lifestyles:

Modern Studios

One-Bedroom Apartments

Facilities & Services
The project is designed to provide a complete residential experience, including:

Swimming pool running along the project

Private beach for relaxation

Cafés and restaurants serving a variety of cuisines

Fully equipped gym and spa

Secure parking

Commercial mall for daily needs

Payment Plans
Flexible payment options are available to make your purchase easy:

10% down payment + installments over 2 years

20% down payment + installments over 3 years

30% down payment + installments over 4 years

Oro Beach Resort is your perfect choice for luxurious living or smart investment in one of Hurghada’s most vibrant areas.

title.en: 1 bedroom apartment garden view at La Vanda Suites
title.ar: 1 bedroom apartment garden view at La Vanda Suites

description.en:
La Vanda Suites Hurghada is a modern residential development located in the rapidly growing area of Hurghada, designed for comfortable living and smart property investment. The project combines contemporary architecture with a relaxing resort-style atmosphere, making it ideal for both holiday homes and rental income.

La Vanda Suites offers stylish studios and apartments with functional layouts, high-quality finishes, and spacious balconies. Residents can enjoy a peaceful environment while still being close to beaches, restaurants, shopping areas, and the vibrant lifestyle of the Red Sea coast.

The project focuses on comfort, security, and leisure, creating an attractive opportunity for investors and buyers looking for affordable property in one of Egypt’s most popular seaside destinations.
Main facilities:

Large swimming pools

Sunbathing and relaxation areas

Landscaped gardens

24/7 security and reception

Elevators

Housekeeping and maintenance services

On-site cafes and small shops

Parking area

Rental and property management services

These facilities make the project attractive both for holiday living and rental investment in the Red Sea area.
20% down payment instalment 34 months

description.en:
La Gouna Resort Hurghada is a modern residential development located in Hurghada, offering a comfortable lifestyle close to the Red Sea. The project is designed in a contemporary resort style, combining elegant architecture with peaceful surroundings.

La Gouna Resort features a selection of studios and apartments with smart layouts, private balconies, and quality finishes. The project provides a relaxing atmosphere with beautiful landscaped areas and leisure facilities, making it ideal both for holiday homes and long-term living.

Its convenient location allows residents easy access to beaches, restaurants, shopping areas, and the vibrant lifestyle of Hurghada, making it a great opportunity for both living and property investment on the Red Sea coast.

title.en: Ready To Move Apartment 2 BR Finished Sea View
title.ar: Ready To Move Apartment 2 BR Finished Sea View

description.en:
Selena Bay

Apartment For Sale Prime Location Sea & Pool View

BUA : 93 Meter

2 Bedrooms - 1 Bathrooms - Reception - Terrace - Kitchen

Fully Finished All electrical appliances only
 
Total Price 6.690.000

For More Info 01066699903
-----------------------------------------
Selena Bay Resort is a modern holiday destination where all the apartments are privately owned. 
Built around a 4 pools it is the ideal place to relax and soak up the sun. 
Its first successful project  Located just 5 mins from the famous El Gouna home to a multitude of bars, restaurants, watersports and every activity you could possibly want to take part in during your stay. 
Hurghada city centre is a 15 minute taxi ride away where you will find literally 1000’s of shops, bars, restaurants and lots of attractions for you to visit.
On-site at Selena Bay you will find everything you could possibly need to enjoy your stay including the following:
4 Swimming PoolsBar/ Resturant 
Well Stocked Mini Market 
Security
Lifts To All Floors
24hr Reception
Kite surfing center
Sun Loungers
Private beach 
Free Car Parking Outside The Front Door
The resort started construction in April 2016 & was completed on time in December 2018 & owners are now using their apartments to use as a holiday home, rent out or have moved in. Sold out before the completion.
Launched: January 2016
Construction start: April 2016
Resort Location: Northern Al Ahyaa, beside Caves hotel Hurghada Redsea, Egypt

title.en: Studio apartment for sale at Oro Beach Resort
title.ar: Studio apartment for sale at Oro Beach Resort

description.en:
Oro Beach Resort Hurghada is a luxury beachfront development in Al Ahyaa, offering modern studios and 1–3 bedroom apartments with sea views. The resort features private beach access, contemporary design, and lifestyle amenities, making it ideal for holiday stays, permanent living, or investment on the Red Sea coast.
Beach & Pools

Private sandy beach with direct access to the Red Sea 

Multiple swimming pools with sun loungers and landscaped pool decks
Wellness & Activities

Fully equipped fitness centre (gym) 

Spa and wellness facilities for relaxation
Dining & Social

On‑site restaurants and cafés 

Commercial zones and shops for essentials and convenience
10% down payment — balance payable in 24 months (2 years).

20% down payment — balance payable in 36 months (3 years).

30% down payment — balance payable in 48 months (4 years).

title.en: Units from 82 sqm with open view
title.ar: Units from 82 sqm with open view

description.en:
Location
•	Al Ahyaa, Hurghada
• 5 minutes from Al Ahyaa Promenade
• 8 minutes from El Gouna
• 20 minutes from Hurghada International Airport
•	
Project Description
•	The project spans a total area of 30,000 sqm, with 80% allocated to green landscapes and swimming pools, and only 20% dedicated to buildings, offering a serene environment that blends privacy, comfort, and open nature. The smart master plan ensures maximum relaxation and enjoyment.
•	
Available Views
•	• Pool view
• Garden or street view
• Partial sea view
•	
Features, Facilities & Services
•	• 6 swimming pools with various designs suitable for all ages
• 2 Aqua Parks for more fun and entertainment
• 3 dedicated Kids Areas
• Sky Pool with stunning panoramic views
• Luxury spa and fully equipped gym
• Clubhouse for social activities
• 100-meter-long strip mall with shops, restaurants, cafés, and various services
• Cafés and restaurants with distinctive views
• 2 Pool Bars
• Panoramic elevators
• Electric vehicle charging stations
• Full hotel services (housekeeping & laundry)
• Underground parking
• 24/7 security and surveillance
• Various water sports
• Diving center & kitesurfing academy
• Beach activities such as volleyball
• 2 panoramic restaurants
• Private beach covering 10,000 sqm
•	
Unique Design Features
•	• The first Sky Pool experience in Egypt
• Smart design ensuring extended sea views
• Stunning sandy beach vibes
• Two parks dedicated to adults and children

•	The project spans a total area of 30,000 sqm, with 80% allocated to green landscapes and swimming pools, and only 20% dedicated to buildings, offering a serene environment that blends privacy, comfort, and open nature. The smart master plan ensures maximum relaxation and enjoyment.
•	
Available Views
•	• Pool view
• Garden or street view
• Partial sea view
•	
Features, Facilities & Services
•	• 6 swimming pools with various designs suitable for all ages
• 2 Aqua Parks for more fun and entertainment
• 3 dedicated Kids Areas
• Sky Pool with stunning panoramic views
• Luxury spa and fully equipped gym
• Clubhouse for social activities
• 100-meter-long strip mall with shops, restaurants, cafés, and various services
• Cafés and restaurants with distinctive views
• 2 Pool Bars
• Panoramic elevators
• Electric vehicle charging stations
• Full hotel services (housekeeping & laundry)
• Underground parking
• 24/7 security and surveillance
• Various water sports
• Diving center & kitesurfing academy
• Beach activities such as volleyball
• 2 panoramic restaurants
• Private beach covering 10,000 sqm
•	
Unique Design Features
•	• The first Sky Pool experience in Egypt
• Smart design ensuring extended sea views
• Stunning sandy beach vibes
• Two parks dedicated to adults and children
